title: LIG4 syndrome: clinical and molecular characterization in a Chinese cohort.
author: Sun B Chen Q Wang Y Liu D Hou J Wang W Ying W Hui X Zhou Q Sun J Wang X
content:
S-EPMC7257218 PMC7257218 LIG4 syndrome: clinical and molecular characterization in a Chinese cohort.

Background

DNA Ligase IV (LIG4) syndrome is a rare disease with few reports to date. Patients suffer from a broad spectrum of clinical features, including microcephaly, growth retardation
